name: Turkey Breakfast Sausage
recipeIngredient: 3 1/4 pounds turkey legs, deboned (do not skin or trim fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Work the turkey through a meat grinder using the disc with the largest holes.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the ground turkey and mix thoroughly by hand.
3. Form the mixture into patties, using about 1/4 cup for each.
4. Preheat a medium nonstick fry pan over medium-low heat.
5. Transfer the patties to the pan in batches.
6. Cover and cook for about 10 minutes over medium-low heat, flipping the patties after 5 minutes until they are brown and crusty on both sides.
7. The turkey sausage will keep for up to 5 days in the refrigerator or for 6 months, uncooked, in the freezer.
YIELD: 12-14 sausage patties
